evidence: The paper uses penalized logistic regression (SCAD + Ridge PLR) as its primary discriminative method, with variable importance derived from regression coefficients: "The most important proteins selected in the CD versus UC model...as visualized in boxplots showing the coefficients of the model (Figure 3B)." Random Forest is used only for sensitivity checking: "probability scores were estimated using a Random Forest (RF) model using the R-package ranger to explore potential method dependency...results from RF and partial least squares analyses demonstrated a pattern consistent with the probability scores obtained using PLR." Protein rankings also come from univariate Welch t-tests with FDR correction on individual protein levels, not from RF impurity importance.
